description: Esports cognitive-combine data over MCP: free cohort stats, paid player & team scouting reports.
name: app.neurorank/mcp

headers.description: API key for the paid tools (get_player_report, get_team_report). Omit it to use the free anonymous tool get_cohort_stats. Create a key at https://neurorank.app/account (Billing > API access); requires an active scout or team subscription.
headers.name: x-api-key

title: NeuroRank
